name: Rich Chocolate Pumpkin Truffles
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Coffee liqueur or apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the powdered sugar into half and a quarter cup measures.
2. In a medium bowl, combine vanilla wafer crumbs, ground almonds, 1/2 cup powdered sugar, and cinnamon.
3. Blend in chocolate chips, pumpkin puree, and coffee liqueur (or apple juice).
4. Form the mixture into 1-inch balls.
5. Chill the truffles until firm.
6. Just before serving, dust with the remaining powdered sugar.
